narrative:
Precinct Wapakoneta 2A (precinct in Auglaize County) has 643 registered voters, with 66.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
